## Summary

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What happened instead. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots when helpful.

## Sample data

If the issue depends on GeoJSON or options, attach a minimal sample (redact secrets). For web issues, mention whether `map` or `editor` mode is used and whether assets are included once or per instance.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps narrow the issue down.
